headline: BofA AI and Digital Innovations Fuel 30 Billion Client Interactions
summary: AI-driven solutions, global payments, and personalized financial planning tools have propelled Bank of America clients' digital engagement to record levels. Clients connected with their finances approximately 30 billion times last year through a combination of digital logins and proactive alerts, marking a 14% year-over-year increase.

headline: Investing $1K in Warren Buffett’s Favorite Bank Stocks 10 Years Ago Would Have Netted This Much

headline: How The Blue Owl Capital (OWL) Narrative Is Shifting As Analysts Reset Expectations
summary: Blue Owl Capital’s fair value estimate in our narrative has shifted from US$17.47 to US$16.40, keeping it broadly in line with Street targets clustered in the low to mid teens. That adjustment sits against a backdrop of more cautious research, where many analysts are trimming targets as they weigh concerns around retail private credit flows, valuation reset, and sustained negative media coverage, while also considering views that underlying credit performance remains solid. As you read on,...

headline: Umicore - Transparency notification by Bank of America Corporation
summary: Transparency notification byBank of America Corporation In accordance with article 14, § 1 of the law of 2 May 2007 on the disclosure of major holdings, Umicore was recently notified by Bank of America Corporation that it has crossed the legal threshold of 3% for the equivalent financial instruments downwards on 5 March 2026. The total holding of direct voting rights and equivalent financial instruments of Bank of America Corporation stands at 3.11% on 5 March 2026. Summary of the move by Bank o
